name: Pariah's Resolve
description:
Channel Volendrung's power to grant you and nearby group members Major Brutality, Major Sorcery, Major Endurance, and Major Expedition for 20 seconds, increasing your Weapon and Spell Damage by 20%, your Stamina Recovery by 30%, and your Movement Speed by 30%.

Activating this ability removes all snares and immobilizations from you and grants immunity to them for 4 seconds.
